name: unifi
description: Unofficial Codex plugin for working with UniFi Site Manager and local Network controllers.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect UniFi Site Manager and local Network controllers.
interface.longDescription: Unofficial helper plugin for Ubiquiti UniFi environments. It guides Codex through official Site Manager API reads, local controller access, site discovery, client/device inspection, and configuration-change workflows.
defaultPrompt: List my UniFi Site Manager sites and hosts.
